message:
chore: Bump version to 0.1.62

Release v0.1.62 includes:
- T6.3: Probe fixture loader for no-mock testing
- T7.3: JSONL logging with phase markers in daemon E2E
- Enhanced GitHub Actions workflows
- Improved connector parsing robustness
- Enhanced encryption and indexer modules
- HTML export improvements with archive config
- TUI component polish and theming
- Comprehensive E2E test updates
- New accessibility and mobile Playwright tests
- Benchmark regression detection improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "coding-agent-search"
-version = "0.1.61"
+version = "0.1.62"
 edition = "2024"
 authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel"]
 description = "Unified TUI search over local coding agent histories"
